title: FightSafe AI: Traceability and Auditability Software for Safety-Alert Review Workflows
description: Research software for alert-candidate export traceability, auditability, protocol-defined bookkeeping, and governance requirements in safety-alert review workflows. Release v0.1.3 bundles TapKO reference exports and reproduction scripts; reported protocol demonstration is machine-side only (reviewer and gate records not logged). Not a validated operator-facing product; no deployment-readiness claim. Companion to manuscripts on information fusion, traceability architecture, and FightSafe-Bench. Not a medical device.

creators.name: Andrés, César
creators.affiliation: CRIA-BDHS Research Group, Higher Polytechnic School of Technology and Science, Universidad Camilo José Cela, Madrid, Spain
